args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS AgentId, SUM(COALESCE(oi.Quantity,0) * COALESCE(oi.UnitPrice,0.0)) AS Sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#',''))
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2022-06-25') AND date('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY Sales DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS AgentId, SUM(COALESCE(oi.Quantity,0) * COALESCE(oi.UnitPrice,0.0)) AS Sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#',''))
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2022-06-25') AND date('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY Sales DESC
LIMIT 1;
